title: SUCCESS: Strategic decision: Deferred Fly.io cloud relay to prioritize manual Reddit/GitHub outreach. Root cause of stuck...
content: Approach: Strategic decision: Deferred Fly.io cloud relay to prioritize manual Reddit/GitHub outreach. Root cause of stuck sending: Mac load average was high (11.41) due to Cursor Helper (PID 9452 at 103% CPU), causing local Ollama API requests (10k+ token context evaluation) to time out. Fix: Reduced CHAT_STREAM_FIRST_BYTE_MS from 120s to 30s and CHAT_STREAM_IDLE_MS from 90s to 30s in hermesGatewayClient.ts to fail-fast. Verified: 557 Jest unit tests passing. Tags: mac-performance, diagnosis, mac-freeze-rescue, ollama-timeout, strategic-decision.
